raw_input.title: BackEnd Developer
raw_input.job_html_or_text: BackEnd Developer. Design, develop and maintain stable services using Django. Implement asynchronous processes with RabbitMQ. Internal and external APIs. Python, Django, RabbitMQ, SQL/MySQL/Postgres, Linux and Git.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer with 4+ years, API delivery, AWS, product integrations and backend ownership.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: strong backend/Django fit should rank high unless location details introduce a specific blocker.
